message:
Port `deduplicate` tests to new test framework

Move deduplicate operator tests from test-legacy to the new test
framework in test/tests/operators/deduplicate/.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,5 +7,4 @@ from {x: 1, seq: 1},
      {x: 2, seq: 7},
      {x: 2, seq: 8},
      {x: 1, seq: 9}
-batch
 deduplicate x, distance=3, count_field=drop_count
